data.readmeSummary:
## RealTime Twitter Data Scraper API

A real-time X platform tweet data extraction Actor that collects and structures tweet content, author profile metadata, engagement metrics, media and link assets, geo and timestamp information, conversation threading, and network-related signals for large-scale social data analysis. The Actor exposes advanced filtering and query capabilities to target tweets by attributes and returns structured, machine-readable records suitable for analytics, sentiment and trend detection, audience profiling, media analysis, and network mapping. Technical capabilities include high-throughput ingestion, real-time capture, rich per-tweet attributes (engagement counts, language, timestamps, media and link details), comprehensive author metadata, timeline and historical context, and outputs optimized for downstream analytics and machine learning workflows.

## Use cases

- Competitive intelligence and market-shift prediction using tweet-level signals and trend trajectories  
- Market research and audience insight generation from aggregated engagement and profile data  
- Influencer and micro-influencer discovery by analyzing engagement patterns and profile metrics  
- Predictive modeling and sentiment analysis for early trend detection and forecasting  
- Audience segmentation and lookalike modeling based on behavioral and network signals  
- Content optimization and timing strategies using engagement velocity and resonance metrics  
- Network intelligence: mapping follower/following relationships and influence pathways  
- Campaign intelligence and performance marketing: building audiences, attribution modeling, and CAC projections  
- Brand intelligence and reputation monitoring via sentiment and engagement trends  
- Risk monitoring and early-warning systems for reputation or crisis detection  
- Lead and pipeline generation using intent and engagement signals from social activity  
- Research and academic studies of social behavior, timelines, and multimedia diffusion  
- Partnership and opportunity discovery through network overlap and influence scoring
